function_v0.doc: Fetch a single credit entry by its ID.
function_v0.name: get_credit

function_v0.doc:
Record a new credit (utang) extended by a store to a customer.

The `store_owner` must sign the transaction. Returns the auto-generated
credit_id for this entry.

TODO: add customer wallet support in future version (needed for USDC settlement)
function_v0.name: create_credit

function_v0.doc:
Record a payment proof against an existing credit.

The original `store_owner` who created the credit must sign.
This is a ledger-only operation \xe2\x80\x94 it tracks the payment on-chain
without moving any tokens.

Returns `true` when the credit is fully settled, `false` otherwise.

TODO: add USDC transfer_from once customer wallet approval flow exists
function_v0.name: record_payment

function_v0.doc: Get the total outstanding balance for a customer across all their credits.\n\nReturns 0 if the customer has no credits on record.
function_v0.name: get_customer_balance

udt_union_v0.doc: Storage key enum \xe2\x80\x94 each variant maps to a distinct slot in contract storage.
udt_union_v0.name: DataKey

void_v0.doc: Tracks how many credits have been created (used to generate IDs).
void_v0.name: CreditCount

tuple_v0.doc: Maps customer_id -> total outstanding balance across all their credits.
tuple_v0.name: CustomerBalance

udt_struct_v0.doc: A single credit (utang) record stored on-chain.
udt_struct_v0.name: CreditEntry

fields.doc: Original amount owed (in PHP centavos or agreed unit).
fields.name: amount

fields.doc: How much has been paid back so far.
fields.name: amount_paid

fields.doc: The customer who owes the amount (off-chain DB ID, for indexing).
fields.name: customer_id

fields.doc: Unix timestamp (seconds) when this credit is due.
fields.name: due_date

fields.doc: The sari-sari store that extended the credit.
fields.name: store_id

fields.doc: The Stellar address of the store owner who created this credit.
fields.name: store_owner

cases.doc: No credit entry found for the given credit_id.
cases.name: CreditNotFound

cases.doc: Payment amount must be greater than zero.
cases.name: InvalidAmount

cases.doc: Payment would exceed the remaining balance owed.
cases.name: Overpayment
